node.html:
• Optimized AI/ML data pipelines, achieving a 30% reduction in processing time, by optimizing ETL processes, implementing parallel computing, and leveraging Hadoop and Spark for distributed storage and in-memory processing.

  • Enhanced the performance of open-source projects (IOWarp, Chronolog), improving system throughput by 25%, by implementing multi-threading and optimizing memory management.

  • Accelerated containerized deployment of HPC applications, cutting setup time by 15%, by leveraging Docker, Jarvis-cd and Linux kernel tuning for scalable cloud based environments.

• Developed and optimized machine learning models to improve real-time multilingual voice synthesis accuracy by 15%, ensuring seamless contextual translation across global markets.
  • Spearheaded development of automated pipelines for preprocessing and feature extraction on 100k+ multilingual audio samples, reducing data preparation time by 30%.
  • Deployed machine learning models for real time voice localization using containerized environments (Docker, Kubernetes), achieving a 20% reduction in latency and enabling scalable cross-platform integration.

• Designed and implemented user-friendly and responsive UI components using Flutter and Dart.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams to align frontend features with backend requirements, ensuring seamless integration and efficient performance, enhancing team efficiency by 15%.
  • Conducted extensive testing and debugging to improve user interface functionality across different devices

• Achieved a 60% improvement in platform performance for a healthcare software solution by identifying and resolving critical bugs using debugging, database management, and software optimization skills.
  • Led implementation of robust data validation and cleaning processes, ensuring 100% accuracy of records.
  • Automated data entry system, reducing workload and improved data handling efficiency by 30% leveraging Python scripting, database management, and process automation.

• Cooperated with a team of web professionals, led development, design and technical support for a E-commerce website for a client; completed project 2 months prior to the deadline.
  • Got exposure to agile development methodologies and project management processes, successfully executing 2 projects deploying these methodologies.
  • Gained knowledge of front-end technologies such as html, css and javascript to create and handle multiple projects.

• Collaborated and partnered with 3 cross-functional teams to identify and address business challenges through data analysis.
  • Implemented tableau to analyze and identify flaws in unstructured data provided by the marketing team for a facebook advertisement resulting in 34% revenue growth.
